blocks.content: Amy shouted, her face flushed with anger.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You thief! Using someone else's property to make a barricade? If you're a magician, fight me fairly! What, are you scared you'll lose to me?

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Haha! Is there any need for that when there's such a difference in our levels? Especially since I know, Armin, that you're not in your normal state.
Arius placed his hand on the statue.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: The rehearsal is over. The reason I waited for you before the main event is that I wanted to share this historic moment with everyone. Enjoy the spectacle, as it's something you'll never see again in your lifetime.
Casting the scale magic Resizing, the 8-meter-tall statue of Ataraxia shrank to the size of a chess piece.
As the archangel's statue turned into a figurine, Zion's eyes sparkled.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: At that size, it could be carried around easily. He could use Ataraxia anytime, anywhere.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Hmm, this is excellent. Now then...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You thief! That's Shirone's! If you touch it, I won't let you get away with it!
Seeing Amy trembling with rage made Zion feel ecstatic.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Haha! What are you going to do? There's nothing you can do anyway. Just watch as Ataraxia becomes mine.
Arius grabbed the archangel's figurine and lifted his upper body with a grunt.
But for some reason, it didn't budge.
He strained until his face turned red, but it was no use.
Arius let go of the figurine and stepped back.
He looked around at the people watching him and then burst into embarrassed laughter.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Hahaha!

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Why wasn't it moving? Resizing reduces the scale of space, so it has nothing to do with mass. A small pebble to a human is a giant boulder to an ant.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Even so, it can't be lifted. A mass that transcends dimensions? No, there's no dimension that surpasses scale magic. So what's the problem?
Unable to bear it, Zion pushed Arius aside and took his place.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Move. Why are you struggling with this?
Arius let Zion try.
While the boy's strength was no different, Armand could exert power comparable to Schema.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Magicians, honestly...
Zion clicked his tongue and bent over.
Grabbing the archangel's figurine and clutching his wrist with the other hand, Armand responded immediately.
Activating muscle enhancement system. Increasing energy metabolism rate. Enhancing muscle fibers. Flexing operational joints. Strengthening ligament tensile strength. Resetting force center.
Ughhh!
As Zion straightened his back while holding Ataraxia, he was surprised by its unexpected weight.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: But he was overflowing with strength thanks to Armand's muscle enhancement program. He felt like he could move a boulder the size of a house.
Zion extended his bent knees and pulled his upper body up.
Finally, the archangel's figurine began to lift about a finger's width.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This won't do! We have to get in there and take it back!
Amy shouted, but Armin only watched Zion's movements.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: As a scale magician, he knew. Ataraxia wasn't heavy because of its mass. Some other rule was at play.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: What's happening?
Zion succeeded in lifting Ataraxia to his waist.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Got it! Now it's mine...!
At that moment, a metallic screech echoed, and the surroundings turned red.
The peaceful temple atmosphere suddenly became perilous.
As the archangel's figurine released a shockwave, Zion and Arius were thrown against the walls.
Meanwhile, Armin's group was safe, thanks to the mental wave barrier absorbing the impact.
Zion steadied himself with Armand's help.
As he tried to rush back to Ataraxia, Arius, leaning against the wall, shouted.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Stop! Don't go near it!
A magic circle was engraved on the floor, and a cylindrical barrier of light rose to protect the figurine.
Ancient heavenly script began to inscribe itself rapidly on the barrier's surface.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: We need to get Ataraxia back quickly!
Reina nocked an arrow and prepared to charge.
But Armin extended his arm to block her.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Wait! That's a sealing formation.
If alchemy advanced magic technologically, sealing formations advanced it spiritually.
Magicians don't recognize the dichotomy of good and evil, but the religious community has used sealing formations to imprison many entities defined as evil.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Why is there a sealing formation in Shirone's consciousness?

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: It's impossible to inscribe something in the primal consciousness without leaving a trace.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Even with possession, there should be a statue like Ataraxia. Perhaps it was a mutation that occurred when Shirone was an embryo.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: But the likelihood of a logically constructed sealing formation manifesting in the 1st stage of consciousness was lower than the chance of wind-blown parts assembling into a carriage.
The golden ancient script climbing the barrier of light completed the process.
As the programming dissolved, a sentence appeared in the center of the cylinder.
Arius quickly interpreted the heavenly language.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: La Hadamah Judran Arab, Ya Ahud Min Al-Foud. Lord of Chaos, break down the walls of the boundary. Whatever it is, it won't be cute. Huh?
A new phrase appeared below the sentence.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: A sealing formation requires the sealant's signature. Like an exorcist's command, 'In the name of so-and-so.' This was also proof that Shirone's security device was an artificial construct.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: What...?
Armin and Arius, who could read the ancient language, froze.
The light line, as if written by a human hand, slowly drew a period next to the designer's name.
The name of the lost one was inscribed.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: McClain Goffin.
Master of the Avatar (1)

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'Impossible! Impossible! Impossible!'
Arius's mind raced faster than ever. It was a mix of 80% excitement, 19% fear, and 1% denial.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: The sealing formation designed by Goffin was clearly a security device to prevent the excavation of the primal consciousness. Otherwise, there was no explanation for its silence until now.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: But why... why?

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: The 1st stage is at the genetic level. Could Goffin's relic be hidden here?

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Goffin's work ended 18 years ago. So when was the sealing formation created?

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Arius thought of Shirone's age.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'Eighteen. But which eighteen? Before the reset? After the reset?'

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: There was no way to know. But Arius had a thought that felt like blind faith.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'Could it be the reset point?'
The rift field verification experiment proves the discrepancy between time and energy. Though the discrepancy is fleeting, it causes the universe to crack.
There's no guarantee Shirone was born from the rift. There's no evidence to support it.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: But Arius was gripped by a strong conviction.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: If Goffin truly designed the security device, no existing magician could deactivate it.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: But why wasn't it installed in the 11th stage, where external interference is greatest?

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'Because it had to be.'

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: It was installed in the fetal or embryonic state.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'Was excavation impossible from the start?'

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: No diver, not even Arius, could break through Goffin's sealing formation.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: But he hadn't given up hope yet.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: 'It depends on what comes out of there.'
The entity trapped in the sealing formation emerged above the magic circle.
It resembled a rhinoceros, with grayish-white skin covered in rough, bumpy protrusions that even a knife couldn't penetrate. It had seven eyes, one in the center and three on each side.
As the creature broke free from the sealing formation, it placed its foot on the ground.
When it pulled up its other leg, the temple floor collapsed, and it poured into the ground.
Judging its size by its face was a mistake. Its body was 100 times larger than its face.
Its belly was grotesquely swollen, and thousands of lightning-shaped horns covered its back.
It looked like the real form of the Rage Form Egoist that had manifested in the 7th stage.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Damn it!
Arius cursed and backed away.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: The Demon Behemoth.
It was the king of beasts that existed long before human history.
Powerful demons would bow to Behemoth, hence it was called a demon god.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Behemoth, awakened from its long slumber, didn't move for a moment. Then it stretched its neck and loosened its body, looking down at the people with its seven eyes.

blocks.speaker: Behemoth
blocks.content: Foolish humans, by the contract of sealing, I shall destroy you.
Behemoth, having issued its death sentence, generated electricity at the tips of the horns on its back.
As thousands of lightning bolts lit up simultaneously, everyone's faces turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: Damn! We need to get out.
Arius opened the door and escaped immediately.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: We need to get out too! Follow me!
Zion, looking longingly at the archangel's figurine, turned his gaze to Behemoth's electrifying power and screamed, running towards the door.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: We need to get out too! Follow me!
Armin shouted to the two women.
This time, there was no need to think.
A demon god was a double-S class entity by magical society standards.
This meant it had the power of 370 9th-level combat magicians.
Even practically, it would take over 20 6th-level magicians, assuming they knew the strategy to defeat it.
Moreover, in real combat, various variables arise depending on traits and combinations, so at least 1.8 times the practical combat power is required to subdue it stably.
In other words, with this party, they couldn't even scratch it, let alone harm it.
Without looking back, Amy and Reina threw themselves through the door, and Armin immediately followed with Flicker magic.
Thousands of lightning bolts intertwined into a web-like electric field.
The bolts, exceeding their saturation point, spread out and scorched the space.
The door, absorbing the powerful energy, vanished with a pop.
Armin's group was flung out of the door like being shot from a cannon.
Amy and Reina rolled on the ground, while Armin barely managed to land on his feet.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Are you alright?
Amy coughed repeatedly.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Suddenly, I couldn't breathe. Cough!
As soon as they jumped through the door, a powerful heatwave from Shirone's mental world hit them.
If they had been a moment later, they would have been roasted by Behemoth's bolts.
Arius had already fled, leaving only Zion behind.
But he seemed too confused to take any action against Armin's group.
Amy saw Shirone hanging upside down in the web.
The time field hadn't been released yet, but he couldn't hold on much longer.
Eventually, the field would have to be released, and no one could predict what would happen next.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It looks like his blood vessels have been cut. What should we do?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: What did you imprint on Shirone's consciousness?
Amy shook her head in despair.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I couldn't think of anything. So I just wrote 'Shirone.'

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You did well. If you can't devise a concrete strategy, something abstract might be more helpful. We can use Shirone's consciousness. Now, we'll release the time field. Be prepared.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But...!
Amy wasn't ready.
Changing the flow of consciousness might make Shirone instinctively find a solution, but if it failed, his neck would be cut in the next moment.
